scripts.check:arch-gate:portable: pnpm run check:command-reachability && pnpm run check:platform-discipline && pnpm run bridge-spec:check && pnpm run check:drift && pnpm run check:debt-ratchet
scripts.check:arch-gate: pnpm run check:arch-gate:portable && pnpm run check:sync-contract
scripts.test:minimal: pnpm exec tsx tests/conformance/generate.mjs --check && pnpm run test:unit:minimal && pnpm run test:editor:minimal
scripts.test:full: pnpm run test:unit:full && pnpm run test:editor:full
scripts.test:e2e:rest: playwright test --workers=2 --grep-invert "Markdown Spec|P0 Crash and IME Regressions"
scripts.test:unit:minimal: vitest run src/app/createAppBootstrap.test.ts src/features/editor/editorInit.test.ts src/features/sync/createExternalChangeCoordinator.test.ts src/lib/platform/pathSafety.test.ts src/lib/platform/index.contract.test.ts src/lib/platform/tauri/adapter.contract.test.ts src/lib/platform/tauri/appConfig.test.ts src/lib/platform/tauri/imageRendering.contract.test.ts src/lib/platform/tauri/images.test.ts src/lib/platform/tauri/notesRoot.test.ts src/app/createAppBootstrap.contract.test.ts src/app/startNativeShell.test.ts src/app/startTabsPersistence.test.ts src/lib/platform/windowsRuntimeConfig.test.ts src/features/system/updater.test.ts src/features/system/updateChecker.svelte.test.ts src/lib/platform/updaterConfig.test.ts src/features/system/UpdateBanner.svelte.test.ts src/lib/constantsConformance.test.ts scripts/build-updater-manifest.test.mjs scripts/desktop-version.test.mjs scripts/package-safety-policy.test.mjs scripts/premerge-test-parity.test.mjs scripts/release-build.test.mjs scripts/release-channel.test.mjs scripts/typescript-script-runtime.test.mjs scripts/verify-updater-signature.test.mjs tests/lib/tauri-test-client.test.mjs
scripts.test:platform-tauri: vitest run src/lib/platform/index.contract.test.ts src/lib/platform/tauri/adapter.contract.test.ts src/lib/platform/tauri/appConfig.test.ts src/lib/platform/tauri/imageRendering.contract.test.ts src/lib/platform/tauri/images.test.ts src/lib/platform/tauri/notesRoot.test.ts src/app/createAppBootstrap.contract.test.ts src/app/startNativeShell.test.ts src/app/startTabsPersistence.test.ts
scripts.test:editor:minimal: pnpm --filter @futo-notes/editor exec vitest run src/conformance.test.ts src/images.test.ts src/bridge.test.ts
scripts.ci: pnpm run lint && pnpm run check:svelte && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run test:full && pnpm run build
scripts._comment: Tauri commands (dev, build, deploy) live in the justfile — use `just` from the monorepo root. Only toolchain scripts (vite, vitest, playwright, eslint) belong here.
